suggestions.rationale: Decision deferred to today's ACDE (June 18) from ACDT #83. Builder execution requests system contract needs final approval before glamsterdam-devnet-6 launch targeted for June 25.
Launch targeted for Wednesday June 25 (7 days out). Test vectors due Monday June 23. Scope includes EIP-8282 plus remaining repricing EIPs. Need confirmation on client readiness and test coverage.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-5 status and recovery plan
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #83 reported devnet-5 stable but with Prysm gossip/PeerDAS issues. Need update on whether stability is sufficient to abandon devnet-6 relaunch or proceed as planned.
ACDT #82 decided on Option 2 (enshrine in Genesis). Action item for Toni/Mario/frangio to align on whether to modify EIP-7997 or create new EIP. No follow-up in ACDT #83.

Benchmarking optimizations are primary blocker for final gas cost numbers. ACDT #82 noted numbers looking good. Need confirmation that benchmarking is complete and final repricing values are ready for devnet-6.
ACDT #83 mentioned 3+ implementations exist and PR #793 under review. Ongoing work but not blocking fork progress. Update on alignment and adoption timeline across clients.
Deferred to devnet-7 or devnet-8 pending EPBS devnet stability. If glamsterdam-devnet-6 launches successfully and remains stable through weekend, EIP-7688 could be staged for devnet-7.
